📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年05月25日 周一

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [0xSero/codex-shim](https://github.com/0xSero/codex-shim)
   Local Responses-API shim that exposes Factory BYOK models (and optional ChatGPT  | ⭐475
2. [larajuniorlara/Claude-Design-Studio](https://github.com/larajuniorlara/Claude-Design-Studio)

3. [muhammadqasimkalhoro94-blip/claude-zeroclaw-agentics](https://github.com/muhammadqasimkalhoro94-blip/claude-zeroclaw-agentics)

4. [rayhayqal/Mythos-Claude-Skill-Forge](https://github.com/rayhayqal/Mythos-Claude-Skill-Forge)

5. [testerlingcodo/gemini-antigravity-cli](https://github.com/testerlingcodo/gemini-antigravity-cli)
   gemini antigravity 2.0 cli google terminal ai agent tool agy migration guide mcp | ⭐297
6. [MoonshotAI/kimi-code](https://github.com/MoonshotAI/kimi-code)
   The Starting Point for Next-Gen Agents | ⭐271
7. [mikaeldengale-cloud/Deepseek-v4-Pro-App](https://github.com/mikaeldengale-cloud/Deepseek-v4-Pro-App)
   deepseek v4 flash pro chat  api  app windows 11 desktop client github open sourc | ⭐250
8. [Jawaz-Keyzor/DarkGPT](https://github.com/Jawaz-Keyzor/DarkGPT)
   Unrestricted ChatGPT client with built-in jailbreak presets, web interface, and  | ⭐247

- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
